taxon.author: Magalhaes & Ramírez, 2019
taxon.distribution: Mexico, El Salvador, Nicaragua, Costa Rica. Probably introduced to Peru, Chile

referenceObject.reference: Magalhaes, I. L. F. & Ramírez, M. J. (2019). The crevice weaver spider genus Kukulcania (Araneae: Filistatidae). Bulletin of the American Museum of Natural History 426: 1-151. doi: 10.1206/00030090-426.1.1
